title: How to get runID from
excerpt: How to get runID at application side ? When our app got action request we want to log runID (or any other unique event ID)

posts.author: solotony (Antonio Solo)
posts.cookedHtml:
How to get runID at application side ? When our app got action request we want to log runID (or any other unique event ID)

image912×682 28.2 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
You will need to generate your own unique ID (or use one from your environment, such as a request ID), and if there is a failure, return it in the error handling response so that it shows up in the integrations activity section for failures.

They do not send it to us. The only hope you may have is by writing code to read the activity log - but that has latency means you need to wait, then have logic to figure out which activity log event was responsible for the change. not ideal.

There are a couple feature request related to this open already, some called trigger ID instead. Youll find them with a search of that subsection.
